_comment: v0.5.3 (bundle 008 / dogfood Entry 03) — advise-mode hook active. PreToolUse: AskUserQuestion (always) + Bash (write/deploy/send whitelist via wrapper). Stop: ledger revisit-date + pending-review scan. All hooks exit 0 (advisory, never block). Per Hyperbrief.md §11.1 v0.5.3 + Constellation §13.16.9 (DECISION_REQUEST family in A2A allowlist since v2.5.27). Constellation-on → review item posted to board; Constellation-off + auto_generate_review_doc=on → .hyperbrief/pending-reviews/<id>.md placeholder; default 'ask' → stderr advise only.
